name: 🚀 Cosmos
description: Space missions, planetary observations and satellites — a full bronze → silver → gold pipeline showing layered transforms and quality tests.

pipelines.name: missions
pipelines.description: 200 synthetic rocket missions across six agencies and five planetary targets.

pipelines.name: observations
pipelines.description: 1000 synthetic telescope observations: when, where, magnitude, instrument.

pipelines.name: satellites
pipelines.description: 120 satellites in current operation by type and operator.

pipelines.name: missions_enriched
pipelines.description: Missions joined with mission_type and decade, the silver-layer convenience view.

pipelines.name: observations_daily
pipelines.description: Observations aggregated to one row per day-planet, used by the gold layer.

pipelines.name: success_by_program
pipelines.description: Mission success rate per agency — the bottom-line metric.

pipelines.name: satellite_summary
pipelines.description: Satellites grouped by type and operator with totals.

quality_tests.name: missions_id_not_null
quality_tests.description: Every mission must have an id.
